import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const HomePage = ({ user }) => (

Golf Charity Subscription Platform

Join, track your golf scores, support charity, and win monthly prizes.

Subscribe

Monthly or yearly plans via Stripe.

Enter Scores

Last 5 Stableford scores (1-45).

Monthly Draws

3/4/5 number matches with prizes.

Support Charity

10%+ of subscription to chosen charity.

{!user ? : }
); export default HomePage;
